title: Behind Blue Eyes
why_this_song: Behind Blue Eyes by The Who (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: No one knows what it's like
But my dreams, they aren't as empty
As my conscience seems to be
My love is vengeance that's never free

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "knows" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "knows" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: No one knows what it's like
My love is vengeance that's never free

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: No one bites back as hard
When my fist clenches, crack it open

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Behind Blue Eyes" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Behind Blue Eyes"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Who one question about "Behind Blue Eyes", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Who sobre "Behind Blue Eyes", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Behind Blue Eyes" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Behind Blue Eyes" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Behind Blue Eyes", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Behind Blue Eyes", o que aconteceria?
